title: Fishy Create Stuffs
description: A Create mod addon I made
body:
A Create mod addon I made

Here's all the stuffs I added

-Through Shaft Gearbox  
-Train Stair



![all the mod contains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/495e71eb766fc5c9b84fae4c170e47c379ffa40f.png)

## Introduction about its contents  
Through Shaft Gearbox: A gearbox which one of the opposite sides are connected by a shaft. Which means their rotation direction is the same  
Train Ladder: Trains in Create have a floor that is two blocks above ground.Players can't jump that high so this block comes out
